text:
きみの実力が優れているという話を
いやというほど聞かされてね。

疑うわけじゃないんだけど
やっぱり私自身の目でも確かめて
おきたくなるってもんじゃない？

そこでタイムアタックってことさ。
そう、目標達成までの時間を競うアレ。

あの演習を、制限時間遵守はもちろん
それなりの評価でクリアしてみせてよ。
難易度は一番カンタンなやつでいい。

記録も残るし報酬も得られる。
きみに損はな

I've heard all sorts of things about you, pal.
More than I ever asked to, if I'm being honest,
here.

Now, not to say I don't believe the tales--I
do, sure do--but don't ya feel better when you
get to see things with your own two eyes?

So, here's what I'm thinking.
Time Attacks! You know, where you try
and do whatever it is you're supposed
to do as fast as ya can? Those!

Why don't ya go and complete one of those for
me? An easy one will do. Stick to the time
limit, but score yourself a nice rating!

You'll get yourself on the record books, earn
some rewards, and make me a happy camper
while you're at it. Can't beat that, right?
